creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Fri Aug 24 22:27:24 2012
New Revision: 303103
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303103

Log:
  - Update to 4.1
  
  Changelog:
    * Add '-D' flag to show default value(s) only.
  
  PR:		ports/171012
  Submitted by:	dteske (maintainer)
  Approved by:	eadler (mentor)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile
  head/sysutils/sysrc/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile	Fri Aug 24 22:27:24 2012	(r303103)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	sysrc
-PORTVERSION=	4.0
+PORTVERSION=	4.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://druidbsd.sourceforge.net/download/

==============================================================================
